title: Take the Pawn, Take the King
setup: Your queen rakes the 7th rank and your king on **g6** is one step from the action.
hint: Capture the {{h7}} pawn — your king defends the queen and Black has nowhere to flee.
explanation:
## The Idea

A classic **corner kiss-of-death**. The queen captures the lone pawn defending the king and lands on a square defended by your own king.

Play {{Qxh7#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- The queen on h7 attacks h8 directly (check)
- {{g8}} — covered by the queen on h7 (diagonal)
- {{Kxh7}} is illegal — your king on **g6** defends h7
- Nothing can block: the queen is adjacent to the king

> **Takeaway:** The corner is the most dangerous square for a king with no escape. When your queen and king cooperate at distance two, every nearby square is a candidate kill — especially after capturing the king's last shield.
